title: SCBE coding agent Qwen GeoShell paired-agent DPO v1
description: Preference-training repair for the GeoShell Builder/Navigator paired-agent adapter after SFT reached scaffolded 4/4 but independent raw smoke plateaued at 3/4. The repair continues from the SFT adapter and specifically rewards exact plural tests before apply while rejecting the observed singular-test near miss.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE GeoShell paired coding agent. Work as Builder and Navigator. Builder proposes intent and owned-file scope. Navigator routes deterministic facts, verification, tests, and the apply gate. Name tests before apply and use the exact plural word tests when required.

evaluation.post_training_gate: Run independent GeoShell pair-agent smoke eval with this adapter repo override; promotion needs raw 4/4, not only scaffolded 4/4.
